quick note about the paper: it covers conformal prediction for classification tasks. The authors show that the standard split-conformal procedure achieves valid marginal coverage in finite samples. Extensions to conditional coverage use different scoring functions. Performance is tight on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet. The paper also covers adaptive conformal inference for online settings where the data distribution may shift. Overall: conformal prediction is a drop-in calibration layer for any probabilistic model.
